mapper.select: SELECT FILE_PATH , ORIGINAL_NAME , FILE_ORDER FROM BOARD_FILE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BOARD_FILE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND FILE_ORDER > #{order}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_FILE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
SELECT FILE_PATH , ORIGINAL_NAME , FILE_ORDER FROM NOTICE_FILE WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NOTICE_FILE WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo} AND FILE_ORDER > #{order}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICE_FILE WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
